column6:
Like CIM4 but with MFC CSN's enabled. Report CSN in CSN_4002 format and CSN_5002 format.


From CIM1 configuration:
APP,CT_MF_CLASSIC,0 , CA_CSN
OPT,CSN_FORMAT_ISO14443A_CL1_CL2 ,        ((CSN_4002 << 8)  | wl.CSN_5002_CL2)

column2: Kc2 of Lk10003 (IBM) and Kc2 of Lk10043 (RedHat) ***These are both set to Kc2, not Kc1
